notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper ball physics, AI, scoring, audio, and game states; minor issue is the serve prompt overlaps the play area awkwardly and the AI difficulty may feel slightly easy at lower speeds.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with perfect physics, beatable AI, progressive difficulty, Web Audio sound effects, and robust delta-time handling.
A solid and mostly complete Pong clone with correct scoring, AI, and presentation, but it loses points for minor control/state inconsistencies and non-perfect gameplay polish.
